items.title: Nearly 20% of S&P 500 Stocks Hit 52-Week Highs Today
items.description: Nearly 100 stocks in the S&P 500 reached new 52-week intraday highs during Wednesday trading, signaling a broadening of market participation despite a retreat in the technology sector.    While a selloff in tech shares weighed on the market, 92 stocks in the S&P 500 hit one-year peaks, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

items.title: Dozens of Stocks Hitting 52-Week Highs
items.description: A significant number of stocks in the S&P 500 reached new 52-week intraday highs during Wednesday trading, signaling a broadening of market participation despite a retreat in the technology sector.    While a selloff in tech shares weighed on major indexes, 82 stocks in the S&P 500 hit one-year peaks by midday, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

items.title: Jim Cramer says the tech sell-off proves why this old investing rule still matters
items.description: Tech is not the only investable part of the market, CNBC's Jim Cramer stressed Wednesday.

items.title: AbbVie Beats on Q4 Earnings, Stock Down Despite Upbeat '26 View
items.description: ABBV beats Q4 earnings and revenue estimates, but shares slip as Rinvoq and oncology sales miss expectations despite strong 2026 EPS guidance.

items.title: These hot S&P 500 stocks show where investors are heading as they run away from tech
items.description: These hot S&P 500 stocks show where investors are heading as they run away from tech
